ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of air quality measurement */,
  "overall_aqi_value" INTEGER /* Overall air quality index value */,
  "main_pollutant" TEXT /* Main pollutant measured */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site where data was collected */,
  "site_id" TEXT /* ID of the site where data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., AQS) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site for geographical context */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site for geographical context */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the data was collected */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the data collection */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of data collection */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant (e.g., CO, Ozone, PM10, PM25, NO2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the pollutant */,
  "safe_threshold" REAL /* Safe threshold level for the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the site */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density around the site */,
  "industrial_activity" TEXT /* Level of industrial activity around the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., AQS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_pollutant_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where data was collected */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant measured */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of measurement */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the pollutant measured */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site where the data was collected */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site where the data was collected */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the data was collected */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the data collection */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of data collection */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_pollutant_data_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_pollutant_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality index */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of air quality measurement */,
  "aqi_value" INTEGER /* Air quality index value */,
  "main_pollutant" TEXT /* Main pollutant measured */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site where the data was collected */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site where the data was collected */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the data was collected */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the data collection */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of data collection */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_indexes_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where pollutant level exceeded threshold */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant that exceeded threshold */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when pollutant level exceeded threshold */,
  "threshold_exceeded" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether threshold was exceeded */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site where the alert was triggered */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site where the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* List of emails or contacts to whom the alert was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where data was accessed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
